title: bidens tenera var. paucidentata
intro: Bidens tenera var. paucidentata, also known as few-toothed beggar's lice, is a variety of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Bidens tenera var. paucidentata include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
